description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1), operating in manual mode, was traveling north on Florida Street approaching Treat Avenue in San Francisco. 
The Zoox vehicle slowed to a stop to allow an oncoming tow truck (Vehicle 2) to clear. As the tow truck was passing the Zoox vehicle the 
driver's side mirror of the tow truck made contact with the roof-mounted sensor pod on the rear driver's side of the Zoox vehicle. The sensor 
pod on the Zoox vehicle sustained moderate damage. The tow truck operator left the scene without exchanging information. There were no 
reported injuries and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
